reviews.title: It's a good toothbrush
reviews.text: It's a good toothbrush. I like that it vibrates every 30 seconds to help you keep track of the time. The brush tips are not too stiff as to be uncomfortable but stiff enough to get the job done.

reviews.title: Surprisingly fantastic!
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:be0e9ab7d6ac2bbe6f1a5308058bc84a]] I have tried other electric toothbrushes but this one exceeded my expectations. My teeth felt clean and I love the built in timers. No more second guessing if you have brushed long enough with this one.

The toothbrush has a great battery life. It took several hours to fully charge but once the light indicator turned from red to green; I haven’t had to charge it again. I have brushed my teeth more than 6 times and the battery is still going strong.

Another great feature is the ability to choose cleaning speeds and (cleaning and whitening) modes with the push of a button. I really enjoyed the high frequency clean mode. When I use this toothbrush, my teeth and tongue feels amazing day and night.

And finally, I was delighted to get 5 refill brush tips. The brush tips have a small profile making it easier to brush my wisdom teeth and the bristles are gentle to my gums. This is a great toothbrush with so many features making it a good value for about $30.

reviews.title: Love this!
reviews.text:
I have no idea how they make a battery last so long! It’s a wonder for sure! I have not needed to charge this thing since I got it, and that was weeks ago.
I love all the color combos that goes with this. There’s black, pink, white… so you can actually blend it in with your bathroom decor.
I opted for the black because our new granite tops are very dark in color.
There are a bunch of attachments that I might never use, but appreciate!
And for this price?! This is an awesome price point. You can’t go wrong with this rechargeable tooth brush.

title: Oral-B Sensitive Clean Electric Toothbrush Head with Clean & Care Technology, Extra Soft Bristles for Gentle Plaque Removal, Pack of 12, Suitable for Mailbox, White
description: As one of Oral-B’s premium replacement toothbrush heads, the Sensitive Clean features ultrathin bristles that are gentle on gums, combined with regular bristles that are tough on plaque. Sensitive Clean removes up to 100% more plaque and reduces gum inflammation by 100% compared to a manual toothbrush. The unique combination of end rounded and ultrathin bristles make Sensitive Clean ideal for everyone with a sensitive mouth and everyone who is looking for just a great gentle clean. Compatible with all Oral-B handles except Pulsonic & iO.
features: Easy delivery: 12 counts of Oral-B Sensitive Clean toothbrush head in a mailbox compatible and non-printed recyclable packaging
With Clean Maximiser technology, green bristles turn yellow when it is time to replace your brush head
Up to 100 Percent more plaque removal and healthier gums vs. a regular manual toothbrush
Oral-B’s best for whole mouth cleaning (excluding Oral-B iO)
Dentists recommend to change brush head every 3 months for the best clean

reviews.title: If you have sensitive gums, buy this OEM Oral-B Toothbrush Head vs Chinese After-Market
reviews.text: My wife has sensitive gums.  These OEM Oral-B toothbrush heads are much softer but still do the job vs supposedly equivalent "sensitive" Chinese After-Market heads.  While the Chinese after-market toothbrush heads are much cheaper, they contributed to my wife's $2,000. gum surgery.  I swapped back to OEM Oral-B brush heads and all is now good for her.  Live and learn I guess or, better yet, you get what you pay for.  Buy these OEM Oral-B toothbrush heads with confidence.

reviews.text: I hate when having to choose to use a regular stationary toothbrush, or my big rechargeable toothebrush when traveling. This toothbrush was perfect to take with me on my last trip as it is small, lightweight, sleek with the rose gold design, and comes with a really nice and compact case. Another huge plus is that it is really very quiet when it is on, so you don't risk having to wake others up. It is a great choice for a travel toothbrush.

reviews.title: I really like this tooth brush
reviews.text:
I personally like a firm/hard bristled brush, but they don't seem to be available any longer. I ordered this "medium" 4-zone Colgate brush and found it to be very effective, and as close to firm as your going to get. Also, I really like the back of the brush, as it has an effective tongue cleaning pad that works well and feels great. I am now going to order some more of these while they're available.... I really like this tooth brush!
Note: This is a three pack, which is not in the bold description, but listed in the smaller font.

reviews.text: These toothbrushes are designed to clean teeth while simultaneous removing plaque from the gum line. The outer bristles angle out. I found the brush to be effective. The bristles are gentle. I have sensitive gums and they were not irritated or sore after use. Good brush.

reviews.title: Very wide
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. It is quite unusual. It is very, very wide. Make sure you see how much. I don't think I've ever seen one this wide. How it works for you is just going to depend on whether you like that. You can get a lot more at the same time, but some people may find it uncomfortable, especially if you have a small mouth. But it is a way to be very efficient and get a lot of areas. It feels well made. It seems like a quality brush.

reviews.title: Nothing fancy but does the job.
reviews.text: Toothbrushes are necessary and seem to be the one thing that I forget to purchase when I go to the store. So, ordering these Ooak toothbrushes was a no-brainer. These are not fancy. They are traditional toothbrushes that leave your teeth feeling smooth and clean (grit free). There are five rows of soft bristles…the three rows in the center are straight and the outside (colored) ones are slightly angled. The colors of the brushes are neutral, white and orange. The rubber grip handle makes it easy to grip and hold. And finally, on Amazon this two pack is under $7, which is reasonable when compared to other two packs on the market. I’d recommend these.

reviews.title: A unique set of toothbrushes
reviews.text: This toothbrush set has been designed in a V design for the bristles - which means that it looks different than other toothbrushes. The bristles have a lot of space to get in the gum line, in between teeth and works well. I got the medium bristles which are fine with me. I don't want too hard of a bristle, as that is not recommended by the dentist. This does a decent job cleaning.

title: Oral-B CrossAction Toothbrush Heads - 16 Degree Bristles for Superior Cleaning
description:
Product Description
The Oral-B CrossAction brush head is our most advanced replacement brush and is now available as a Black Edition. With the perfectly angled CrissCross bristles, it goes deep into the interdental spaces and ensures a superior plaque removal compared to a conventional manual toothbrush. The blue indicator bristles indicate when to change the brush head. The brush head is compatible with all Oral-B electric toothbrushes except Oral-B Pulsonic. 3 Oral-B CrossAction Black Edition replacement toothbrush heads are included.
Set Contains:
3 x replacement brushes.
features: Advanced brush heads reach deep between the teeth
With the perfectly angled CrissCross bristles
The blue indicator bristles indicate when to change the brush head

reviews.title: Great for Sensitive Gums and Teeth
reviews.text:
I was told by my dentist to switch toothbrushes from manual to Oral-B electric toothbrush because it stops brushing when you brush too hard and keeps your enamel in tact, which helps relieve sensitive teeth. The dentist also recommended Oral-B because it was a good price point and has great features like a timer for 2 minutes and gets really close to the gum to get rid of icky plaque. Since I have been using Oral-B, he has noticed that I no longer have any plaque build up between cleanings and my sensitive teeth are gone. He also says my teeth look whiter and brighter. I love the toothbrush because it is light and easy to hold and get to those hard to reach places in the back of your mouth. It also leaves your teeth feeling extremely clean compared to a manual toothbrush. I can never go back to a regular toothbrush now because I tried on vacation once and felt absolutely disgusting in comparison. Oral-B is definitely the way to go for a clean mouth feel!

mouthwashes to ACT Restoring because it restores enamel that is weak and will alleviate sensitivity and use Glide Comfort Floss. Boy, was she correct. After just a few days of using the mouthwash I no longer feel that uncomfortable sensation on my teeth. I also am no longer needing prescription strength toothpaste. I now use this mouthwash twice daily and floss once a day, in combination with Sensodyne's Repair and Protect toothpaste. My gums do not bleed when I floss and I don't dread flossing. Glide floss goes easily between even the tightest teeth and has a lovely mint flavor that helps freshen breath at the same time. Changing the floss and mouthwash have made a huge improvement and now I can eat hot or cold foods without wincing in pain.

reviews.title: I am one of those people that can't stand the ...
reviews.text: I am one of those people that can't stand the feel of soft bristled toothbrushes.  I am therefore stuck looking all over to find one of the medium bristled ones.  I have finally found one that feels right and leaves my teeth feeling clean without making my gums bleed.

reviews.title: Good delivery but poore choice by the packager
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. I often use this brand and style it holds up very well, however I did not like the fact that they sent a guy a pink toothbrush.

reviews.title: Very good travel toothbrush when your sonic is at home.
reviews.text: or when the rest of the family is asleep and you don't want the noisy electric brush to wake them up. The thick handle and light weight is ideal for the elderly or those with arthritis making a tight grip harder to do. I like the medium brush better than the soft bristle, with the medium you don't have to brush as hard for clean teeth and as long as you aren't grinding the bristles into your mouth your gums should not become stressed. With the soft bristle, while ideal for gums, my teeth don't feel as clean.

reviews.title: Polishing star takes some getting used to
reviews.text:
I'm not sure the polishing star is really more effective than normal bristles if you do a good job of brushinganyway, and it is a but squeaky on my teeth and can rub the gums the wrong way if you are careless in brushing.

That said, the medium bristles are effective and not too hard, and I did like the head size, handle grip and overall effectiveness.

title: Oral-B Kid's Toothbrush featuring Disney's Frozen, Soft Bristles, for Children and Toddlers 3+, 1 Count
description: The Oral-B Pro-Health Stages manual toothbrushes featuring characters from Disney's Finding Dory is the perfect kids toothbrush for your own little explorer. Crest + Oral-B Stages helps kids brush their best with features designed to support healthy oral hygiene such as a tongue cleaner and Power Tip (soft) bristles to clean hard to reach teeth. So get Crest + Oral-B Stages to help your little ones practice proper oral care habits that will last them a lifetime.

reviews.title: Soft toothbrush with cute design
reviews.text: Study toothbrushes.  My toddlers love these toothbrushes and often request to have their teeth brushed just so they can hold their toothbrushes for a little while.  They would just wander around the house chomping on them throughout the day, if I allowed them too but, I know they aren't suppose to so I don't let them. :)  No bristles seem to be falling out and we have been using them for about a month at this point.  The bristles are quite soft and seem to be gentle enough for the toddler aged child.

title: Kids U-Shaped Toothbrush, Food Grade Soft Silicone Brush Head, U-Type Toothbrush Whole Mouth with Handle for Kids, 360°Oral Teeth Cleaning Design for Toddlers and Children, Heart Shape 2-6 Ages
description: Kids U-Shaped Toothbrush, Food Grade Soft Silicone Brush Head, U-Type Toothbrush Whole Mouth Toothbrush with Handle for Kids, 360°Oral Teeth Cleaning Design for Toddlers and Children
features: COMFORT AND SAFETY: The easy-grip handle provides comfort and security, making it easier for toddlers to hold their own toothbrushes. Two lovely colors increase your child's interest in brushing and have fun while brushing.
INNOVATIVE U-SHAPED DESIGN: Ergonomic U-shaped brush head that fits the shape and mechanics of children's tooth structure. Specifically designed for children's delicate gums and sensitive teeth.

360° FULL CLEANING: The 360° full cleaning brush head, soft nipple-grade silicone, provides a comfortable brushing feel and cleans your teeth properly without twisting your wrist. Effective deep cleaning without damaging gums and protecting children's enamel.
CUTE DESIGN: This cute U-shaped manual kids toothbrush is designed to make brushing for kids (2-6 years old) more fun and easy. Let your child try it once and he or she will love this toothbrush.
PACKAGE INCLUDES: pink toothbrush*1, blue toothbrush*1, saliva towel*1. After receiving the product, if you have any questions or concerns, please contact us so we can help.

reviews.title: great deal
reviews.text: Really cannot pick because of the price. Item as described and came with a very simple bib. These work as awesome teethers for my twins but in order to make it work for toothbrushing independence, you do need a cooperative toddler who's willing to bite down and keep the teeth between the brushes. If your kids are willing to bite down and brush with these, they work great for encouraging toddlers to maintain healthy dental hygiene. I think it's already awesome for the price and works great as a teether.

title: COSLUS Kids Sonic Rechargeable Electric Toothbrush: Interactive Smart LED Light Toddler Silicone Tooth Brush (Bluelue)
features: 🌟INTERACTIVE FUN BRUSHING: Featuring cute cartoon character design and rainbow LED lights, COSLUS electric toothbrush makes brushing more fun and easier for boys and girls ages 3+. Your children will be rewarded with a star after each successful brushing, which can motivate them to collect all the stars, fall in love with brushing teeth, and enjoy endless fun with cute characters. Studies show that 93% of parents prefer an interactive toothbrush to develop their child's healthy brushing habits

⏰BUILDS HEALTHY BRUSHING HABITS: Based on the professional advice of brushing teeth twice a day for two minutes each time, COSLUS toothbrush sets the smart timer to 2min and lightly vibrates every 30 seconds to remind child to switch to another part of the teeth, thoroughly clean their oral, and develop correct habits. Meanwhile, our toothbrush has 3 cleaning modes with memory function: deep clean, soft clean and massage, you can choose the right mode according to your child's needs

✔️GENTLE & EFFECTIVE CLEANING: Created in partnership with thousands of Professionals, COSLUS kids toothbrush is safe, effective and gentle on incoming teeth and sensitive gums. Ultra-low vibration, children will not feel numb when using. What's more, this toothbrush vibrates up to 31000 times/min, 100% more powerful than ordinary electric toothbrushes. And Come with 2 toothbrush heads: 1 soft bristle for sensitive gums, 1 standard bristle for deep cleaning

🎁Designed For Kids' Oral Development: The unique caterpillar-shaped silicone handle is comfortable and non-slip, more suitable for children's small hands. And widened tongue brush head is made of food-grade silicone to massage kids' tongue while cleaning effectively. In addition, the lock-type design can better prevent brush head from falling off, allowing kids to brush more safely independently. With IPX7 waterproof design, your children can directly rinse and soak it with water after brushing

⚡90 Days Long Endurance: This rechargeable kids electric toothbrush lasts up to 90 days after 2.5 hours of wireless charging, more convenient and faster. It highly reduces the hassle of frequent charging and battery replacement, easy to use at home and on the go. In addition, the average lifespan of our electric toothbrush is approximately 3 years, which is double the lifespan compared to other electric toothbrush

Tips: It is recommended to replace the brush head every three months. ---You can check the related information on the box, get 3 replacement brush heads --- Or buy other brush head sets at the COSLUS store to better experience this electric toothbrush

reviews.title: My grandson actually wants to brush now.
reviews.text:
This brush is fun, and my grandson actually wants to brush since we picked it up.

Brush vibrates quietly, bristles are stationary. As you brush the stars light up.
The goal is to brush long enough to get all the stars lit up.
When you change something into a game, it motivates kids to try to "win".

I like the concept. Charger and extra brush head included.

reviews.title: Great for my daughters toothbrush
reviews.text: We got the actual toothbrush a few months back and although it came with an extra head we wanted to be prepared because it is the only toothbrush my daughter likes to use.  They came packaged just fine and we got all three in perfect shape.  They are like her old heads for the toothbrush, not too hard and not too soft and they fit perfectly.  As long as my daughter still enjoys her specific tooth brush I will keep getting these for her.

title: Better & Better Bamboo Sonic Toothbrush for Adults | Rechargeable Electric Toothbrush | Replaceable Bamboo Brush Heads w/Soft, Plant-Based Bristles | 5 Cleaning Modes & Long-Lasting Battery
features: A Cleaner Clean and Brighter, Whiter Smile - Improve your brushing routine with Better & Better’s Bamboo Sonic Toothbrush for adults equipped with soft, natural, plant-based bristles made from castor bean oil. Our sonic toothbrush produces up to 38,000 microvibrations per minute for high polish and gentle clean. Choose from its 5 cleaning modes depending on your brushing needs.

Smart, Seamless & More Powerful Cleaning - Our bamboo electric toothbrush for adults features a 2-minute dentist-recommended timer with 30-second interval pulses. Flaunt your unique smile with the help of the sonic toothbrush's 5 cleaning modes: cleaning (default) for removing plaque, whitening for improving surface color, polishing mode for brightening your front teeth, milder for gentle gum massage, and sensitive for a super gentle mode for sensitive teeth and gums.

A Better Brushing Routine - The bamboo sonic toothbrush’s cleaning modes and plant-based bristles are safe to use on braces and dental restorations (fillings, crowns, veneers, or implants). Our electric toothbrush for adults is certified cruelty-free and comes in recyclable packaging.

Designed for Optimal Brushing Experience - Our bamboo electric sonic brush comes with replaceable bamboo heads. The entire brush is waterproof, so you can use it in the shower. The long-lasting and rechargeable battery also makes this the perfect travel toothbrush to keep your routine tip top on the go. You only need to charge it every 30-40 days when your routine consists of brushing twice, morning and night.

Better for You. Better for the Planet - We set out to make toothbrushes that are good in every way. Our unique natural bamboo brush heads create less waste when replaced. We prioritize the health of our bodies and our planet, which leads us to imagine entirely new ways of doing things. And as we minimize the ecological effects of our products and packaging, we create a better world.

reviews.title: Best toothbrush ever.
reviews.text:
I’ve used Sonicare Diamondclean for years - but after trying this one, I’ll never go back. It’s gentler, cleans better, and less than half the price of Diamondclean. I love the bamboo, the soft bristles. The only thing I wish it had two buttons (one for on/off, one for the settings), and a wireless induction charging base.
But as is I still love it.

reviews.title: Bamboo sonic toothbrush
reviews.text:
Good, sonic (vibrations rather than spinning) toothbrush. I am sure it helps clean better than a manual one, but I would prefer a spinning head for myself. It comes with only 2 replacement heads which deducts a star as I expect at least 4. It does comes with a toothbrush holder stand to recharge with a 30-40 day battery life. Many of these brushes only come with a ubs cable, so the included toothbrush holder is a great addition. Has a 2 minute timer as well as 5 cleaning modes. This toothbrush is unique as it is made with bamboo making it a more natural product!

Amazon will donate to your favorite charity! Use Amazon Smile (smile.amazon.com) when you order and Amazon will donate to the charity of your choice when you make a qualifying purchase. Check out how Amazon Smile works at https://smile.amazon.com/gp/chpf/about/ref=smi_se_rspo_laas_aas. My shopping is donating to my charity of choice; Unravel, at no cost to me! Unravel is a nonprofit organization working to spread knowledge about the grim realities of pediatric cancer and the devastating impact from the lack of funding. All monies raised by and for Unravel will go directly to the fight against pediatric cancer.

title: Zekuavi Replacement Heads Compatible with Phillips Sonicare Electric Toothbrush, Toothbrush Heads Fits for Diamond Protective Expert Daily 4100 5100 6100 1100 7500 6500, Black 8Pcs
features: ★Compatible with Phillips Sonicare, ProtectiveClean, ExpertClean,DailyClean,2 Series 3 Series, 4100/2100/9900Plaque Control,Gum Health, EasyClean, Essence+, FlexCare, HealthyWhite and HydroClean Philips Brush Handle, (NOT Compatible with Essence,Sonicare One,HX5611/01 Essence)

★US DuPont Bristles: Our brushes are made with DuPont bristles, which is the most representative high-quality nylon bristles. DuPont bristles mainly have the following advantages: high tenacity, strong bending recovery, outstanding wear resistance, and perfect cleaning power.

★Durable brush: Thanks to DuPont bristles, our brush can be used for a long time without being easily deformed, the service life varies according to the brushing strength of each person: from 2 months for high brushing intensity to 3 months for moderate brushing intensity

★End-rounded bristles: For our brush bristles, we have adopted a variety of top-rounding techniques. The protruding bristles on the upper, middle and lower parts of the brush undergo the first rounding process; then the concave part is rounded for the second time to ensure that each bunch of bristles meet the standard. The multi-process is only to better protect your teeth and oral health

★High density bristles: The toothbrush head adopts the latest bristle planting technology, and the number of bristles has increased by 2 times. The bottom of each bunch of bristles is fixed with metal copper sheets, which can prevent bristle shed, increase the durability of the brush head, and greatly improve the cleaning ability.

★Vibration isolation and noise reduction: 306 stainless steel is used at the interface between the bottom of the toothbrush and the electric toothbrush, which can effectively reduce shake and noise, moreover, be more resistant to corrosion. Copper sheet is used inside the brush body to conduct sonic waves, improving the sonic wave transmission efficiency and the cleaning capacity by 5 times.

★Suitable for Home Use: If you purchase our product, you will receive 8 replacement toothbrush heads neatly placed in a blister case. Each brush head has its own color markings at the bottom and back, making it easy to distinguish without worrying about confusion.
★Bacterial Protection Bristles :The special bacterial protection bristles help to keep your brush head clean and inhibit bacterial growth on the brush.

★HYGIENIC CAP :Each replacement sonicare brush head comes with a hygienic secure cover to keep your bristle free of dust and debris. You don't have to worry about bacteria that might cause you dental problems.

★Reminder bristles: Our Green indicator bristles discolour to let you know when to replace them, don't need to worry or guess. Dentists recommend replacing the brush head at least once every 3 months.

reviews.title: Works great with my sonicare
reviews.text: Works great and a good price . Good purchase, very happy with them

reviews.title: A Great Replacement
reviews.text: I'm not sure which model toothbrush I have, only that it's pretty basic and several years old, but still going strong. These brush heads are a perfect fit and work just like the brand name. I did find these to be a bit larger than the one I replaced, and the bristles were a bit longer, so it just felt bigger in my mouth overall. That being said, the bristles on these are softer and I find them to be gentler on my sensitive gums, even with the bigger brush size. Each brush has a colored dot (4 different colors) to differentiate between them if necessary. Overall, I'm happy with these.

reviews.title: Good affordable ootion
reviews.text: These brush heads are a good replacement option at an amazing price.

reviews.title: Works well for my Philips Sonicare 4100
reviews.text: This 8-pack of replacement brush heads for several Philips sonicare rechargeable toothbrush models fits my Sonicare 4100 perfectly. Popped on smoothly with no weird gaps. These are a larger size compared to the small Phillips diamond head style that I have been using and I've included a photo of a comparison showing this new replacement and the Philips sonicare branded brush side by side. I was worried they wouldn't be soft, but they are and I'm pleased with the bristles. After using for a week, I am glad I tried them and wouldn't hesitate to continue to use these and save some money.

reviews.title: Soft bristles
reviews.text:
I was running low on my Sonicare heads so I decided to give these a try, excited because they are a fraction of the cost of the name brand kind, especially for a package of 8.

They fit the handle just fine, but they aren’t chip-enabled to work with the automatic brush change reminder light on several Sonicare handles. So like regular toothbrushes you have to keep track of when you need to change it again.

I put my old ready-to-be-changed head back on immediately, as these bristles aren’t even close to “medium” hardness. They are SOFT. My old head has much stiffer-bristles than this new one, which I prefer.

I gave it a 2 rating because they do work for my Sonicare brush handle just fine, but they don’t work for me personally. If you need soft for sensitive gums, then these are for you.

You can’t go wrong with the Gum Care setting and these replacement heads if you need soft bristles. For the price, a pack of 8 is a steal!

They just aren’t for me, they are way too soft, I’m bummed.
